title: 西瓜条 Watermelon Strip Mod
description: A meme mod about a meme with the name of "Watermelon Strip" (or "西瓜条" in Chinese).
body:
**This is a meme mod, so please do not be too strict with those things in the mod.**

This is a small meme mod about Watermelon Strip Meme and you can know about this meme [Here](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1TY4y1R7cS).  

This mod added a creature, a item and a potion.  

### The creature (Watermelon Strip): 
![Watermelon Strip](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/9EVnArC5/images/fe2fcb64e001b65cb79a7486e6ae001bd3ecd4da.png)  
This creature can walk around and say "家人们谁懂啊？" (which means "Who Knows Me, My Family Members?") when they are walking and say "真的是无语死了！" (which means "I Am Really Speechless") and give players Prawn Head Man effect that lasts for 30 seconds when they dead.  
Some parts of AI of this creature has not been implemented yet.  

### The Item (Watermelon Totem): 
You can make it in the following recipe: 
![Watermelon Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9EVnArC5/images/ccffca72e41ad23eb471dadf38a77c082fae6f27.png)  
There will be a watermelon strip summoned when players right click on blocks with it.  

### The Potion (Prawn Head Man): 
This potion effect hasn't been completed yet.
Here is the icon of this potion: 
![Prawn Head Man Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9EVnArC5/images/904d9bf069d5b3dbab0564970a592e4cfd701cea.png)  
When the time of this effect is up, the player will be killed.
